title: Pyrex 2 Piece Glass Measuring Cup Set, Includes 1-Cup, and 2-Cup Tempered Glass Liquid Measuring Cups, Dishwasher, Freezer, Microwave, and Preheated Oven Safe, Essential Kitchen Tools
description:
About this item
ESSENTIAL KITCHEN TOOL: 2 piece set includes 1-cup, and 2-cup, measuring cups that are perfect for baking, cooking, mixing and more!
EASY TO READ: Featuring bold and large measurements in both ounces and milliliters making this effortless to read!
PRECISE POURING: Adding milk to your cake batter? We got you covered! All Pyrex measuring cups feature a curved spout for non-mess pouring and easy-grip handles for comfort
HIGH QUALITY GLASS: Nonporous glass is BPA free, non-toxic and won’t absorb food odors, flavors, or stains!
MICROWAVABLE: Need to melt a cup of butter for a batch of chocolate cookies, Just throw our Pyrex Measuring Cup in the microwave. High-quality tempered glass is dishwasher, freezer, microwave and preheated oven safe.
PYREX IS THE #1 GLASS PREPWARE BRAND*: Loved for generations, experienced cooks and beginners alike have reached for Pyrex brand glassware products, because they’re affordable, durable, and great for all their cooking, serving and storing needs. Source: The NPD Group / Retail Tracking Service, dollar sales, 12 ME December 2022
reviews_5s:
The Pyrex 2 Piece Glass Measuring Cup Set has quickly become an indispensable part of my kitchen arsenal. This set includes both a 1-cup and a 2-cup measuring cup, both of which nest neatly together for convenient storage—a feature that I particularly appreciate in my kitchen.

The durability of these measuring cups is outstanding. Made from sturdy glass, they withstand daily use without showing signs of wear or scratching. I've used them for both hot and cold liquids without any issues, and they clean up effortlessly in the dishwasher. They are heat resistant.

One of the standout features of these measuring cups is their practical design. The bold, easy-to-read measurement indicators make measuring ingredients quick and accurate, whether I'm baking or cooking.

These measuring cups have a sleek appearance that adds a touch of elegance to my kitchen. The clear glass allows me to see the contents clearly, which is especially useful when measuring liquids or monitoring levels while cooking.

Considering the cost, this set offers excellent value. Pyrex is known for its quality, and this set is no exception. It's a reliable investment that I know will last for years to come.

The Pyrex 2 Piece Glass Measuring Cup Set is a fantastic addition to any kitchen. With its durability, practical design, and sleek appearance, it's a must-have for both amateur cooks and culinary enthusiasts alike. I highly recommend this set for its functionality, reliability, and overall value.Pyrex glass measuring cups are a must-have in any kitchen. Their durability and versatility are unmatched. The thick, tempered glass resists breaking and can withstand extreme temperatures, making them perfect for both microwave and oven use. The measurement markings are clear, precise, and easy to read, even after repeated washes. The ergonomic handle and spout design make pouring liquids mess-free and straightforward. Pyrex cups are easy to clean and don’t retain stains or odors. Whether you’re a casual cook or an avid baker, these measuring cups are reliable and long-lasting. Highly recommended!I recently added the Pyrex 2 Piece Glass Measuring Cup Set to my kitchen arsenal, and it's quickly become an essential tool I can't imagine cooking without. These measuring cups offer versatility in sizes, easy-to-read markings, and unparalleled sturdiness that's hard to beat.

#Pyrex #MeasuringCupSet #KitchenEssentials #CookingTools

The versatility of this set is one of its standout features. With both 1-cup and 2-cup capacities, it covers a wide range of measurement needs in the kitchen. Whether I'm whipping up a batch of cookies or preparing a savory sauce, these cups have me covered.

The markings on the glass are incredibly clear and easy to read. I never have to second-guess my measurements, which is a real time-saver when you're in the midst of a culinary project. It's a small detail, but it makes a big difference in the overall cooking experience.

What truly sets these Pyrex measuring cups apart is their sturdiness and quality. Made from tempered glass, they can handle a wide range of temperatures – they're safe to use in the dishwasher, freezer, microwave, and preheated oven. These cups are built to last and can withstand the demands of a busy kitchen without showing wear and tear.

Not only are they practical and dependable, but they also look sleek and timeless in any kitchen. Their classic design fits seamlessly into any culinary setting.

In short, the Pyrex 2 Piece Glass Measuring Cup Set is a true kitchen workhorse. It simplifies the cooking process, adds convenience to your daily meals, and is built to stand the test of time. If you're serious about cooking and want top-quality tools, look no further.

#VersatileKitchen #QualityTools #EasyMeasurements #CookingMadeEasy #SturdyDesign #KitchenUpgrades #PyrexQualityPyrex cups like these are the gold standard, and these two continue to uphold it. Easy to clean, well marked, and Pyrex quality glass! They both stack well and sore well in our cupboard.You can’t go wrong with Pyrex. These measuring cups are sturdy, reliable, and exactly what you’d expect from a solid brand. Perfect for everything from baking to meal prep. A must-have in any kitchen!These are great for every day and cooking. The quality of these cups is superior and the glass is very thick. Perfect for pouring items as well as easy to see any wet/dry items being measured. The packaging is superior to ensure they weren’t broken in transit. Would highly recommend these measuring cups.Have always loved Pyrex brand products!! Great quality and lasts forever.Great quality glassware!! Easy to read, great sizes, hands fit handles perfectly! Great price too!Classic Pyrex measuring cups. They are thicker than the 30+ year old one they replaced. The open handle is much better than the old closed handle when dealing with hot contents.These are amazing! I use them all the time. They are very durable and can go in the microwave or dishwasher! Amazing!
reviews_1s:
I always thought that Pyrex was quality. I purchased these to replace 15 year old ones that had cracked. After a month of using them, they are rendered absolutely useless. There are no markings left on them whatsoever. They have been hand washed! What do you do with a measuring cup, that doesn’t have the measuring marks on it? I contacted customer service, and I have not heard back. I switched to Anchor Hocking after looking up what was on William Sonoma website- I figured they knew good quality.I’ve owned this set of Pyrex measuring cups for 6 months and all the measurements up to 1 cup are gone. I use these several times a week, many times hand washed, other times in the dishwasher. They are useless now. I purchased this extra set to have on hand in case my other set was dirty. My other set is 15+ years old with green lettering, and I can still see all measurement lines clearly, like when I bought it. They don’t make them like they used to anymore!So frustrated with the two cup measure. It was working so well, went through almost daily dishwasher loads perfectly. The lines were crisp and the weight of the cups are great. The pour spout works just like it should.

But one time of pouring water over a steaming pot and the smallest measurements on the two cup measure literally wiped off on my finger. I'm floored. This is Pyrex, it should last me a few years at least. I'm 10 days past the return window so I'm stuck.The spigot of the 16oz measuring cup is so small that it causes spillage every time when pouring from the cup. The 8oz that was packaged with 16oz in this Amazon purchase, works fine. Must be a manufacturing defect on the 16oz. It passed through Quality control, Shame too, Made USA!
I remember the commercials for Quasar TV’s, “Quality goes in, before the name goes on”
Like it should be for everything.I put a So-called Pyrex Measuring Cup with 1 cup of Water in the microwave on high for 2 minutes Burned my hand trying to get out of the microwave. I have a true Pyrex measuring cup from 1969 and it has never burned my hand from microwaving.Red numbers washed off my measuring cups after 3 washings. Pyrex cups are oven safe & it says dishwasher safe , but these must be cheaply made! What good is a measuring cup without numbers! do not buy!I'm right handed and hold the measuring cup in my left hand and pour what I'm measuring with my right hand. With these cups I'm looking at the metric measure. Really inconvenient. I liked the old design better.These came well packaged and on time, but the one cup had a manufacturer's defect. The glass was sort of warped, and bulged into the cup. Surprised with the lack of quality control from Pyrex. Returned these.Bought the 2 piece Pyrex measuring set. Delivered on 6/1/23. Unboxed and placed set on counter to wash the next day. Next day, heard a glass breaking sound and went into the kitchen (towards the noise). The large measuring piece was shattered in a ton of very small pieces on the counter...the larger pieces of handle looked almost crystalized. Would not recommend this. I was the only one home, no pets. Was not near a window. So could not be an error on our part. Only reasoning is flaw in manufacturing. Looking at Amazon options and can only return (a ton of tiny glass pieces) to get a replacement or refund. Unable to mail back glass pieces! Frustrating and expensive when we paid for a 2-piece set but only have one piece left.Bought these measuring cups in April and by November most of the markings had worn off in the dishwasher, making them useless. We still have a VERY OLD set of pyrex measuring cups where this is not an issue, so something's changed.
